name: Nilesh Armal
title: Backend Developer
summary: Backend Engineer with 4+ years building high-throughput e-commerce systems at scale. Architected 30+ microservices processing 120K+ orders/day and 6K+ API requests/min using Java and Spring Boot. Achieved 81% improvement in database write performance for datasets with 1M+ records. Expertise in event-driven architectures, SQL optimization, and cloud-native deployments. GCP Certified Associate Cloud Engineer.

bullets: Architected and maintained 30+ microservices powering an e-commerce platform processing 120K+ orders/day, serving 2M+ users with 6K+ API requests/min.

Achieved 81% improvement in data persistence performance for MySQL tables with 1M+ records by optimizing batch operations, indexing strategies, and query execution plans. Reduced API response times by 60%.

Designed event-driven architecture using Solace messaging queues and JMS listeners for asynchronous order processing, inventory updates, and real-time notification delivery across distributed services.
Led backend design for a customer-facing feature adopted by 2M+ users, owning the full lifecycle from technical design to production deployment and monitoring.
Implemented caching with Redis and applied design patterns (Facade, Strategy) to reduce redundant database calls and improve service response consistency.
Built CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and containerized services using Docker/Kubernetes, achieving 90%+ unit test coverage with JUnit and integration tests.

projects.name: Personalised Notification and Alerting Platform
projects.tech: Spring Boot, Solace, MySQL, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes
bullets: Designed and developed a multi-channel notification platform supporting Email, SMS, and Push delivery, processing 500K+ notifications/day with 99.9% delivery rate.
Implemented Solace-based event-driven architecture with retry mechanisms and Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) handling for guaranteed message delivery.
Built a user preference engine with channel-specific personalization and automatic fallback routing (e.g., SMS → Email on delivery failure).
Containerized services with Docker and deployed via Kubernetes, enabling horizontal auto-scaling and zero-downtime deployments.

projects.name: Developer Portfolio Website
bullets: Built a developer-themed portfolio with terminal-inspired UI, interactive API playground, and integrated resume viewer with command palette (Ctrl+K).
Implemented boot sequence animations, JSON-formatted contact form, and code-styled project showcases for a unique developer experience.
Optimized for performance and SEO with lazy loading, semantic HTML, and responsive design across all devices.

certifications.name: Associate Cloud Engineer — Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
